alerts.header: Starting June 8, Route 49 stop changes between Wallace St and Boundary Rd will improve reliability. Alternate stops are generally within a block. New eastbound stop at 49th Ave & Wiltshire St. Check your stop before travel. More info: translink.ca/route49
alerts.desc: Please check your usual stop before travelling, as some stops shared with Routes 41 and 26 may also be affected.

alerts.header: Stop 50572 Westbound W 10 Ave @ Crown St is temporarily closed from Thu Jun 25 due to construction
UPDATE: Stop 60219 Westbound University Blvd @ Western Parkway is temporarily closed through Fri Jul 24 due to construction.
UPDATE: Stop 51981 Eastbound E 49 Ave @ Argyle St has temporarily moved 105 metres east to Bruce St from Fri Jul 10 through Tue Jul 28 due to construction.
25 UBC trip leaving Westbound E 22 Ave @ Boundary Rd at 6:18 am is cancelled today due to mechanical issue. Resume King Edward Station.
